agenda_subtitle: Fixed global leadership sequence with one operating slide per region

slides.title: Global Executive Summary
slides.subtitle: Global position, leadership actions, and cross-region control points

source_fields: regions[].scorecard.pipeline-health.Pipeline ARR — Q2 2026 Close Dates Only (excl. Omitted)
metric_rules: Global executive summary is a deterministic rollup of validated regional snapshots.
Top risk and top action are synthesized from validated regional control points.
known_gaps: Leadership summary statements are derived, not direct workbook fields.

slides.title: APAC Regional Summary
slides.subtitle: Display-quarter pipeline, approvals, renewals, and intervention points

metric_rules: Each region slide is populated only from its validated regional snapshot.
Renewals remain ACV and pipeline remains ARR.
If a region has no current-quarter in-scope pipeline, it may fall forward to next-quarter outlook only with explicit footnote disclosure.

metric_rules: Each region slide is populated only from its validated regional snapshot.

slides.title: Global Commercial Approval Overview
slides.subtitle: Approved 2026 exposure and missing-approval candidates by region

metric_rules: Commercial approval overview rolls up approved-2026 and missing-candidate exposure by region.
Largest global missing candidates should be ranked by ARR.

slides.title: Global Appendix and Factual Notes
slides.subtitle: Definitions, hierarchy notes, and known data limitations

metric_rules: Appendix notes should document ARR versus ACV usage and rollup limitations.
known_gaps: Global appendix is partly derived from architecture and rollup rules, not just workbook tabs.
